Class Teacher

java.lang.Object
users.User
users.Employee
users.Teacher
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Researcher
Direct Known Subclasses:
Professor, SeniorLecturer, Tutor
public class Teacher extends Employee implements Researcher
Represents a teacher who can teach courses, grade students, receive ratings, and optionally participate in research.
See Also:

    • getTitle

      public TeacherTitle getTitle()

    • getCourses

      public List<Course> getCourses()

    • putMark

      public void putMark(Student student, Course course, Mark mark)
      Assigns a mark to a student for one of the teacher's own courses.
      Parameters:
      student - the student being graded
      course - the course in which grading happens
      mark - the mark to assign

    • sendComplaint

      public Complaint sendComplaint(Student student, String text, UrgencyLevel urgency)
      Creates a complaint against a student.
      Parameters:
      student - the target student
      text - complaint text
      urgency - urgency level
      Returns:
      created complaint object

    • assignCourse

      public void assignCourse(Course course)
      Assigns a course to the teacher and registers the teacher as an instructor.
      Parameters:
      course - the course to assign

    • canActAsResearcher

      public boolean canActAsResearcher()

    • becomeResearcher

      public void becomeResearcher()
      Activates researcher mode for the teacher.

    • leaveResearcherRole

      public void leaveResearcherRole()
      Deactivates researcher mode for non-professor teachers.

    • acceptRating

      public void acceptRating(Student student, int rating)
      Stores a rating submitted by a student.
      Parameters:
      student - the student who submitted the rating
      rating - teacher rating from 1 to 5
